prompt: Discover features in a Spring Boot repo that has OrderController (GET /api/orders, POST /api/orders, GET /api/orders/{id}, PUT /api/orders/{id}, DELETE /api/orders/{id}, POST /api/orders/{id}/cancel), UserController (POST /api/users, GET /api/users/{id}, PUT /api/users/{id}), and HealthController (GET /health, GET /ready).

assertions.text: All Order endpoints are grouped into a single feature (not split into separate features per endpoint)
All User endpoints are grouped into a single feature
Health/readiness endpoints are excluded from features or flagged as infrastructure, not documented as a business feature
Feature names are human-readable (e.g., 'Order Management', not 'order-controller-endpoints')

prompt: Discover features and create state files for a repo with a single feature: POST /api/payments/charge and POST /api/payments/refund in PaymentController.

assertions.text: State file has YAML frontmatter with feature, slug, source_repo, discovered date, and phase=discovered
State file has an Entry Points section with a table listing both endpoints
State file contains all 9 required sections (Entry Points through Next Steps) even if most are placeholder
Trace Log section has an initial discovery entry with timestamp
The slug in frontmatter is kebab-case (e.g., 'payment-processing', not 'PaymentProcessing')

prompt: Discover features in two repos: order-service (3 features) and user-service (2 features). An index.md already exists with one previously discovered feature 'notification-dispatch'.

assertions.text: The previously existing 'notification-dispatch' feature is still present in the updated index
All newly discovered features are added to the index
The feature_count in index frontmatter reflects the total (existing + new)
Each feature row in the index table includes its current phase

prompt: Discover features but .feature-docs/_settings.md does not exist.

assertions.text: Skill does not proceed to scan repositories

prompt: Discover features with --search 'payment' across repos. order-service has PaymentController and OrderController. payment-service has ChargeController and RefundController.

assertions.text: Results include payment-related endpoints from both repos
Results do not include OrderController endpoints that have no payment relation
Search spans multiple repositories, not just one
